ai-agent.title: [GitHub] langchain-ai/langchain: langchain-core==1.2.22
ai-agent.summary:
Changes since langchain-core==1.2.21
release(core): 1.2.22 (#36201)
fix(core): validate paths in prompt.save and load_prompt, deprecate methods (#36200)

ai-agent.title: [GitHub] openclaw/openclaw: openclaw 2026.3.22
ai-agent.summary:
2026.3.22
Breaking

Plugins/install: bare openclaw plugins install <package> now prefers ClawHub before npm for npm-safe names, and only falls back to npm when ClawHub does not have that package or version. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/clawhub
Browser/Chrome MCP: remove the legacy Chro

ai-agent.title: [GitHub] crewAIInc/crewAI: 1.11.1
ai-agent.summary:
What's Changed
Features

Add flow_structure() serializer for Flow class introspection.

Bug Fixes

Fix security vulnerabilities by bumping pypdf, tinytag, and langchain-core.
Preserve full LLM config across HITL resume for non-OpenAI providers.
Prevent path traversal in FileWriterTool.
Fix lock_stor

ai-agent.title: [GitHub] langgenius/dify: v1.13.2
ai-agent.summary:
This patch release fixes several critical regressions and stability issues introduced in v1.13.1, including:

a severe regression in prompt message transformation that caused multiple LLM-plugin invocation failures across
LLM-related nodes, including LLM and Question Classifier.
Knowledge Retrieval

llm.title: [GitHub] ollama/ollama: v0.18.2
llm.summary:
What's Changed

Add extra check to ensure npm and git are installed before installing OpenClaw
Claude Code will now be faster when run locally, due to preventing cache breakages
Fix to correctly support ollama launch openclaw --model <model>
Register Ollama's websearch package correctly for Op

llm.title: [GitHub] ollama/ollama: v0.18.2-rc1: launch: fix openclaw not picking up newly selected model (#14943)
llm.summary:
Sessions with a stale model field were not updated when the primary
changed, so the old model continued to be used.

llm.title: Malicious litellm_init.pth in litellm 1.82.8 — credential stealer
llm.summary:
Malicious litellm_init.pth in litellm 1.82.8 — credential stealer
The LiteLLM v1.82.8 package published to PyPI was compromised with a particularly nasty credential stealer hidden in base64 in a litellm_init.pth file, which means installing the package is enough to trigger it even without running import litellm.
(1.82.7 had the exploit as well but it was in the proxy/proxy_server.py file so the package had to be imported for it to take effect.)
This issue has a very detailed description of what

llm.title: Streaming experts
llm.summary:
I wrote about Dan Woods' experiments with streaming experts the other day, the trick where you run larger Mixture-of-Experts models on hardware that doesn't have enough RAM to fit the entire model by instead streaming the necessary expert weights from SSD for each token that you process.
Five days ago Dan was running Qwen3.5-397B-A17B in 48GB of RAM. Today @seikixtc reported running the colossal Kimi K2.5 - a 1 trillion parameter model with 32B active weights at any one time, in 96GB of RAM on a

llm.title: Quoting Neurotica
llm.summary:
slop is something that takes more human effort to consume than it took to produce. When my coworker sends me raw Gemini output he’s not expressing his freedom to create, he’s disrespecting the value of my time
— Neurotica, @schwarzgerat.bsky.social

    Tags: ai-ethics, slop, generative-ai, ai, llms

llm.title: datasette-files 0.1a2
llm.summary:
Release: datasette-files 0.1a2
    The most interesting alpha of datasette-files yet, a new plugin which adds the ability to upload files directly into a Datasette instance. Here are the release notes in full:


Columns are now configured using the new column_types system from Datasette 1.0a26. #8
New file_actions plugin hook, plus ability to import an uploaded CSV/TSV file to a table. #10
UI for uploading multiple files at once via the new documented JSON upload API. #11
Thumbnails are now gene

cybersecurity.title: ‘CanisterWorm’ Springs Wiper Attack Targeting Iran
cybersecurity.summary: A financially motivated data theft and extortion group is attempting to inject itself into the Iran war, unleashing a worm that spreads through poorly secured cloud services and wipes data on infected systems that use Iran's time zone or have Farsi set as the default language.

top_articles.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
top_articles.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

top_articles.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

top_articles.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
top_articles.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

top_articles.title: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets
top_articles.summary: The CFTC launched a new task force focused on cryptocurrencies, artificial intelligence, and the rapidly emerging area of prediction markets.

top_articles.title: Silo V3 launches new liquidation mechanism opening door to new forms of crypto collateral
top_articles.summary: Silo V3, unveiled Tuesday, adds a protocol-level insolvency protection mechanism to reduce the dependency on DEX liquidity.

top_articles.title: TD Cowen says prediction market bills unlikely to pass this year, flags 2028 election as ‘real threat’
top_articles.summary: TD Cowen said policy risk remains high for prediction markets, flagging the 2028 election as the "real threat" as bipartisan concerns grow.

top_articles.title: Longevity pharma and RAIN treasury Enlivex secures $21 million debt financing
top_articles.summary: The company struck the financing deal with New York-based The Lind Partners, an institutional fund manager.

top_articles.title: Bernstein says bitcoin looks bottomed, sees 226% upside for Strategy
top_articles.summary: Bernstein said Strategy could see 226% upside if bitcoin has bottomed, with STRC central to its capital model.

top_articles.title: Tether hires Big Four auditor for first full reserves audit
top_articles.summary: Tether has hired a Big Four accounting firm for its first full USDT stablecoin audit after years of scrutiny over its reserves.

top_articles.title: Mastercard, Western Union tap Solana Foundation’s new enterprise developer toolbox
top_articles.summary: The platform offers three API modules to help issue RWAs, support payments, and enable onchain swaps supported by 20 launch partners.

top_articles.title: NYSE taps Securitize to develop 24/7 tokenized securities platform
top_articles.summary: The NYSE, part of Intercontinental Exchange, has partnered with Securitize to develop its 24/7 tokenized securities platform.

top_articles.title: Bitcoin sees rare two-block reorg as Foundry overtakes AntPool and ViaBTC in mining race
top_articles.summary: Despite its relative rarity, the event reflects normal network behavior, as nodes adopt the chain with the most cumulative proof of work.

top_articles.title: Bitcoin hovers below key ‘air gap’ as geopolitical risks and Fed outlook cloud direction
top_articles.summary: Analysts flag a resistance zone above $72,000 as bitcoin holds key support amid geopolitical tensions and macro headwinds.

top_articles.title: BitGo offers OTC prediction market access to institutions via Susquehanna Crypto partnership
top_articles.summary: BitGo's institutional clients will be able to access prediction markets via the custodian's platform and post cash or crypto as collateral.

top_articles.title: Zama and T-REX Network launch privacy layer for tokenized assets targeting Wall Street institutions
top_articles.summary: Zama and T-REX Network introduced a confidentiality layer for tokenized real-world assets, aiming to enable broader institutional adoption.
